title: Smooth Pickup
description: Smoothly picks up items on the inventory
body:
A small mod that frees the items from the pixel grid. This is specifically for big resolutions with big gui scales. The items and tooltips get fixed to the texture grid, which makes them a bit too jagged when moving slowly. It was also made because I was annoyed with the jaggyness of items moving with controllify, so its compatible with it. Comparason table (zoom into the images to see the full detail)
Input On Off
Mouse ![Mouse on](https://github.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/blob/main/other/mods/smooth_pickup/smooth_on.webp?raw=true) ![Mouse off](https://github.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/blob/main/other/mods/smooth_pickup/smooth_off.webp?raw=true)
Controller ![Controller on](https://github.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/blob/main/other/mods/smooth_pickup/smooth_on_controller.webp?raw=true) ![Controller off](https://github.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/blob/main/other/mods/smooth_pickup/smooth_off_controller.webp?raw=true)
